title: phlox viridis
intro: Phlox viridis, also known as green phlox or green-flowered phlox, is a perennial plant that belongs to the phlox family and is native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be used to treat wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of phlox viridis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Phlox viridis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been traditionally used by herbalists to treat a variety of ailments.
